parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Sales Clerk" as SC
participant ": OrderDeliveredUI" as UI <<Presentation>>
participant ": OrderDeliveredController" as Controller <<Application>>
participant ": OrderDeliveredService" as Service <<Service>>
participant ": PersistenceContext" as PC <<Persistence>>
participant "factory : RepositoryFactory" as RF <<Factory>>
database "orderRepository : Repository" as OR <<Repository>>
participant "orderList : List<Order>" as OL <<Domain>>
participant "orderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as ODL <<DTO>>
participant ": OrderMapper" as OM <<DTO>>
participant "orderDTO : OrderDTO" as ODTO <<DTO>>
participant "selectedOrderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as SODL <<DTO>>
participant "order : Order" as O <<Domain>>

SC -> UI : The Sales Clerk initializes\nthe process of updating the status of the order
activate UI
UI -> Controller : create
activate Controller
Controller -> Service : create
activate Service
Service -> PC : repositories()
activate PC
PC -> RF : create
activate RF
RF --> PC : factory
deactivate RF
PC --> Service : orderRepository()
deactivate PC
Service -> OR : create
activate OR
OR --> Service : orderRepository
deactivate OR
deactivate Service
UI -> Controller : listAllDispatchedOrders()
Controller -> Service : listAllDispatchedOrders()
activate Service
Service -> OR : getAllDispatchedOrders()
activate OR
OR -> OL : create
activate OL
OL --> OR : orderList
deactivate OL
OR --> Service : orderList
deactivate OR
Service -> ODL : create
activate ODL
loop foreach
    Service -> OL : getNext()
    activate OL
    OL --> Service : order
    deactivate OL
    Service -> OM : toDTO(order)
    activate OM
    OM -> ODTO : create
    activate ODTO
    ODTO --> OM : orderDTO
    deactivate ODTO
    OM --> Service : orderDTO
    deactivate OM
    Service -> ODL : add(orderDTO)
    activate ODL
    ODL --> Service
    deactivate ODL
end
Service --> Controller : orderDTOList
deactivate Service
Controller --> UI : orderDTOList
deactivate Controller
UI --> SC : The System presents a list of Orders to the\nSales Clerk whose Status are "Preparation"\nand asks the Sales Clerk to choose Orders\nwhose Status will be updated to "Delivered";
deactivate UI

SC -> UI : The Sales Clerk selects the Orders whose\nStatus are to be updated;
activate UI
UI -> Controller : updateStatus(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate Controller
Controller -> Service : updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate Service
loop foreach
    Service -> SODL : getNext()
    activate SODL
    SODL --> Service : orderDTO
    deactivate SODL
    Service -> OM : toOrder(orderDTO)
    activate OM
    OM --> Service : order
    deactivate OM
    Service -> O : changeStatusToDelivered()
    activate O
    O --> Service
    deactivate O
    Service -> OR : update(order)
    activate OR
    OR --> Service
    deactivate OR
end
Service --> Controller
deactivate Service
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> SC : The System updates the Status of the selected Orders\nand informs the Sales Clerk of the operation success;
deactivate UI
@enduml
```
